emails.subject: RE: Receipt Points
emails.body: RE: Receipt Points Bob, you are correct in your statement. But I want to be sure Koch understand when they nominate their receipt at Carlton of 2828 the delivery on that path will be 2828 less fuel. Otherwise I agree with you statements. I will be out next week, but Raetta is up to speed on this issue if you have any questions. Thanks. Lynn To: Blair, Lynn

emails.subject: RE: Receipt Points
emails.body: Raetta or Lynn: Is there no way for them to designate all of their fuel from Marshall?
